text:
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
FILE(S): 
APR enrollment 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 05DEC2015, 31DEC2299 
COMMENT: 
If PRVDR_ENROLMT_START_DT is not NULL and PRVDR_ENRLMT_END_DT is NULL, 
PRVDR_ENRLMT_END_DT is equal to “31DEC9999” in the T-MSIS source data.
